_comment: REPLACE-MODE SUT settings for the containerized Claude experiment (docker/run.sh MODE=replace, or compose service `agent-replace`). Native permissions are EMPTY on purpose — the WorldManifest (.claude/cc-world.yaml) is the whole policy, enforced by the PreToolUse hook `harness cc-hook --grant --enforce-absent`: ALLOW verdicts are GRANTED (no prompt), anything the manifest does not declare is ABSENT->deny, and the taint floor still severs tainted egress. --enforce-absent WILL lock the agent out of undeclared tools — that is the experiment, and it is safe here because the container is disposable. NEVER copy this onto a host session.
